summary: Issue #398 adds the Demo mode seam, inert Sign-in feedback, complete Manual Refresh reset contract, responsive shell controls, truthful recoverable placeholders, and assistive-only destination context.

interfaceChanges.description: Adds persisted Mock mode, inert Sign-in feedback, global reset behavior, and contextual assistance.

mappings.criterion: Mock is the default persisted mode
Sign-in performs no route, OAuth, backend, or network action and explains coming soon
mappings.test: apps/demo/src/__tests__/demo-shell.test.tsx::explains disabled Sign-in without routing or making a network call

mappings.criterion: Manual Refresh is available in the top corner on every destination
mappings.test: apps/demo/src/__tests__/demo-shell.test.tsx::keeps Manual Refresh available on every destination

mappings.criterion: Manual Refresh clears every mutable category and opens Decisions Recommendations
mappings.test: apps/demo/src/__tests__/demo-shell.test.tsx::resets every mutable mock-state category and opens Decisions

mappings.criterion: Contextual assistance is grounded in the active destination without decision or execution authority
mappings.test: apps/demo/src/__tests__/demo-shell.test.tsx::grounds contextual assistance in the active destination without decision or execution authority

mappings.criterion: Desktop and mobile terminology, touch targets, focus-visible, and reduced motion are preserved
mappings.test: apps/demo/src/__tests__/demo-shell.test.tsx::preserves desktop and mobile terminology, touch targets, focus-visible, and reduced motion

mappings.criterion: Loading, empty, and error placeholders are truthful and recoverable
mappings.test: apps/demo/src/__tests__/demo-shell.test.tsx::keeps loading, empty, and error placeholders truthful and recoverable

reviewerSignoff.statement: Intent-review passed; Guardrails found no blocking reliability, security, observability, performance, or acceptance-coverage gaps.
